name: CPT Drives and Power Public Company Limited
summary: CPT Drives and Power Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and distributes electrical equipment and control systems used in industrial plants in Thailand. It operates through three segments: Manufacture and Distribution, Contractor and Installation Services, and Services. The company offers drives and automation products, such as DC drives, LV and MV inverters, and starters, as well as PLC, SCADA and HMI, speed feedback device, and motion-controllers; and electrical power components, including MCCB and ELCB, contactors and relays, air circuit breakers, vacuum circuit breakers, vacuum contactors, power fuses, ring main units, smart motor protection relays, MV switchgear, transformers, bus ducts, liquid and oil-cooled starters/NGRs, and power capacitors. It also provides electric motor products, such as AC/DC motors, IEC standard motors, medium voltage motors, and AC vector motor MAC QI series products. The Company also provides cable installation services for electrical cabinet assembly in general industrial plants and substations, such as lv power cable and control cable, mv power cable, overhead and underground line, system grounding, etc., as well as offers repair service. CPT Drives and Power Public Company Limited was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
